note: Committed snapshot — cold-start floor. Live fetch attempted on each cost_model.py run.

roboflow_managed.note: Roboflow uses a credits-based model. No public per-stream or per-inference price is listed. Dedicated deployment and managed GPU clusters are Enterprise add-ons with custom (sales) pricing. Core plan: $79/mo (annual) includes 15 credits/mo base. Additional credits: $4+ prepaid or $6 flex per credit.
roboflow_managed.raw_pricing_text: Public: Free ($60/month free credits). Core: $99/month or $79/month (annual), 50 credits/month (monthly) or 15 credits/month base (annual). Additional credits available at $4+ per credit (prepaid) or $6 per credit (flex). Enterprise: Custom pricing. Dedicated Deployment: Core and Enterprise only. Managed CPU/GPU Cluster: Enterprise add-on only, custom pricing.

engineer_hourly.basis: PayScale survey, Machine Learning Engineer, US, base salary median, 1127 salary profiles, last updated April 25 2026. Hourly = annual / 2080.
